title: Pumped Desert 2
description: Pumped Desert 2 is a remake of the Pumped Desert mod,Rebuilt from scratch by Pumped Desert.This is a faithful remake of the original Pumped Desert mod, which fans have been asking for a return.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5b5210e434c6071c42511c980be2d3f23068972.png)
## 📖 About:
Pumped Desert 2 is a remaster of the [Pumped Desert](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pumpeddesert) mod. The Cow Skull and the mini cactus have returned to tell you a completely new story. Ostriches, Rhinoceroses, Gopher, Scorpion and Saxaul Jay appeared in the desert. The boss of Alektos, who looks like a scorpion man, is a strong opponent, defeat him, and don't forget about Anibius. Hide under a palm tree or a Saxaul tree, and admire the plants, mini-stones-they have received mechanics now they work like sea cucumbers, admire the tumbleweed. 4 new types of sandstorms, and yes, one of them is from the Valley of the Sand of Souls. A disaster has happened in the desert, a Sand Stone Giant monster has appeared in the deserted arena, try to fight and pick up useful loot, but be careful, because there are traps in the arena. To summon the SandStoneGiant, make sure that you have level 35 XP, then the altar will summon the boss when pressed. The new Eclipse painting will tell you the sad fate of Sand Stone Gaint, where he defended the temple, but his troops crystallized it, decorate your house with it, or hang a portrait of Sand Stone Giant. While traveling through the desert, you can find 2 ruins. Try out different types of weapons: the Legendary hammer, sword and fire staff. To breed animals, feed them: Carrots for rhinoceros, seeds for Ostrich, cactus for Desert-Western Gopher, berries for Fennec, any meat for snake.There has been an update in the Valley of the Sand of Souls, Nether Cactus and new creatures have appeared. There are many different sand blocks to build.   Explore the desert and save its inhabitants from monsters!  

 

Yes, the Pumped Desert is back!

💬 Please do not distribute the mod on other sites.Thanks to the entire development team. 
 

🦎 - Has beautiful animations & requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)


**The NeoForge mod version  has a conflict with OptiFaine**
